channel.title: seasonal-feasts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh seasonal-feasts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Easy and Delicious Honey-Glazed Ham for a Perfect Easter Dinner
item.description: This honey-glazed ham is my go-to for Easter—sweet, juicy, and so simple to make. The glaze caramelizes beautifully, giving it that perfect golden crust. Great for family gatherings or any special occasion!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 90 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 fully cooked bone-in ham (about 8 pounds)
  • 1 cup honey
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar, packed
  • 1/4 cup Dijon mustard
  • 1/4 cup apple cider vinegar
  • 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground cloves
  • Whole cloves for studding the ham (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fully #honey #brown

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy and Delicious Honey-Glazed Ham for a Perfect Easter Dinner
media:content.media:description: This honey-glazed ham is my go-to for Easter—sweet, juicy, and so simple to make. The glaze caramelizes beautifully, giving it that perfect golden crust. Great for family gatherings or any special occasion!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229712965, Easypost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fully, honey, brown

item.title: Quick and Cute Easter Treats Ready in Just 15 Minutes
item.description: These adorable Easter treats come together super fast and bring a burst of color to your table. Using simple ingredients and fun decorations, they’re perfect for last-minute family celebrations or a sweet snack anytime!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup mini marshmallows, fresh
  • 1 cup colorful candy-coated chocolates
  • 1 cup white chocolate chips, melted
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/2 cup crushed graham crackers
  • Assorted edible decorations (sprinkles, edible glitter, small candy eyes)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #marshmallows #colorful #white

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These adorable Easter treats come together super fast and bring a burst of color to your table. Using simple ingredients and fun decorations, they’re perfect for last-minute family celebrations or a sweet snack anytime!

item.title: Simple Yet Flavorful Easter Dinner Recipes to Enjoy with Family
item.description: These easy Easter dinner recipes bring together fresh flavors and simple prep so you can relax and enjoy the day. Featuring crowd-pleasing dishes that come together quickly with ingredients you likely have on hand. Perfect for family feasts or casual celebrations!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 lbs boneless ham, fully cooked
  • 1 cup brown sugar, packed
  • 1/2 cup honey
  • 2 tbsp Dijon mustard
  • 1 tsp ground cloves
  • 1 lb baby carrots, peeled
  • 1 lb asparagus, trimmed
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #brown #honey

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Simple Yet Flavorful Easter Dinner Recipes to Enjoy with Family
media:content.media:description: These easy Easter dinner recipes bring together fresh flavors and simple prep so you can relax and enjoy the day. Featuring crowd-pleasing dishes that come together quickly with ingredients you likely have on hand. Perfect for family feasts or casual celebrations!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229712965, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, brown, honey

item.title: Easy Easter Dinner Menu: Simple, Tasty, and Stress-Free Recipes
item.description: This Easter dinner features easy, delicious dishes that won’t keep you stuck in the kitchen all day. With simple ingredients and clever shortcuts, it’s perfect for a relaxed family celebration.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, thawed
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 lemon, juiced and zested
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 cup baby carrots, peeled
  • 1 cup green beans, trimmed
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth, low sodium
  • Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #lemon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This Easter dinner features easy, delicious dishes that won’t keep you stuck in the kitchen all day. With simple ingredients and clever shortcuts, it’s perfect for a relaxed family celebration.

item.title: Easy Easter Desserts Kids Will Love to Make and Share
item.description: These Easter desserts are super simple and fun, perfect for baking with the kids. Bright colors and easy steps make them a springtime favorite for any celebration or family gathering.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/4 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 1 large egg
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 cup milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Pastel food coloring (optional)
  • Assorted sprinkles and edible decorations

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

item.title: Fresh Herb-Roasted Chicken with Vibrant Spring Sides for Easter Dinner
item.description: This Easter dinner features juicy herb-roasted chicken paired with colorful spring veggies. The fresh herbs bring bright flavor, and the sides add a festive touch. It’s quick enough for a stress-free celebration!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 45 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 whole chicken (about 4 pounds), thawed and patted dry
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 tablespoons fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons fresh thyme leaves
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 lemon, halved
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 pound baby carrots, peeled
  • 1 pound asparagus, trimmed
  • 2 tablespoons butter
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #whole #olive #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Easy No-Bake Easter Sweets Ready in Minutes for Spring Fun
item.description: These no-bake Easter sweets are a lifesaver when you need a quick treat. Made with simple pantry staples and a fun mix-in, they come together in just minutes. Perfect for holiday sharing or gifting!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups crispy rice cereal, dry
  • 1 cup white chocolate chips, melted
  • 1/2 cup mini pastel marshmallows
  • 1/3 cup chopped dried apricots
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Easter Menu Ideas with Fresh, Vibrant Flavors
item.description: These quick Easter dishes come together in just 30 minutes, using fresh ingredients to keep things light and lively. Perfect for last-minute hosting or casual family dinners. I love how simple techniques bring out big flavors!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh baby spinach, washed and dried
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese, room temperature
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • 4 boneless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1 cup quick-cooking couscous
  • 1 1/4 cups boiling water
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #cherry #crumbled

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These quick Easter dishes come together in just 30 minutes, using fresh ingredients to keep things light and lively. Perfect for last-minute hosting or casual family dinners. I love how simple techniques bring out big flavors!

item.title: Classic Italian Easter Cookies with a Hint of Anise Flavor
item.description: These tender, lightly sweet Italian Easter cookies are infused with a subtle anise flavor that makes them truly special. Perfect for holiday celebrations or a cozy coffee break, they bring a little tradition to your table.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, sifted
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 3 large eggs
  • 2 teaspoons baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Powdered sugar for dusting (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These tender, lightly sweet Italian Easter cookies are infused with a subtle anise flavor that makes them truly special. Perfect for holiday celebrations or a cozy coffee break, they bring a little tradition to your table.

item.title: Soft Italian Easter Cookies Bursting with Almond and Anise Flavors
item.description: These Italian Easter cookies are soft and subtly sweet with a lovely almond and anise kick. A sprinkle of colorful sugar adds a festive touch. Perfect for sharing during spring celebrations or any joyful moment!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 1/2 cups almond flour, finely ground
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 teaspoon anise extract
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Colored sanding sugar for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #almond #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: These Italian Easter cookies are soft and subtly sweet with a lovely almond and anise kick. A sprinkle of colorful sugar adds a festive touch. Perfect for sharing during spring celebrations or any joyful moment!

item.title: Fresh Spring Pasta with Peas and Lemon Cream Sauce
item.description: This spring-inspired pasta combines tender peas and zesty lemon cream for a light yet satisfying dish. The secret? A splash of fresh lemon juice that brightens every bite. Great for a quick, refreshing dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces dried fettuccine or linguine pasta
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup fresh or frozen peas
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh basil or parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #dried #tablespoon #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Spring Pasta with Peas and Lemon Cream Sauce
media:content.media:description: This spring-inspired pasta combines tender peas and zesty lemon cream for a light yet satisfying dish. The secret? A splash of fresh lemon juice that brightens every bite. Great for a quick, refreshing dinner.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229712965, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, dried, tablespoon, cloves

item.title: Fresh Spring Pasta with Lemon, Peas, and Parmesan That Brightens Up Any Dinner
item.description: This bright and breezy pasta dish combines fresh peas, zesty lemon, and creamy Parmesan for a light spring dinner. The secret? Using lemon zest and juice to lift all the flavors. Great for a quick weeknight meal when you want something fresh and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces dried spaghetti or linguine
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup fresh or frozen peas
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • Juice of 1 lemon (about 2 tablespoons)
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese, plus more for serving
  • 1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 cup reserved pasta cooking water

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #dried #tablespoon #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This bright and breezy pasta dish combines fresh peas, zesty lemon, and creamy Parmesan for a light spring dinner. The secret? Using lemon zest and juice to lift all the flavors. Great for a quick weeknight meal when you want something fresh and satisfying.

item.title: Easy and Fun Easter Bunny Cupcakes to Make with Kids
item.description: These Easter Bunny Cupcakes are a delightful treat that's super easy to make and perfect for little helpers. Bright, colorful, and topped with cute bunny faces, they’re ideal for spring parties or family fun days.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 box vanilla cake mix (plus ingredients called for on box)
  • 1 cup butter, softened
  • 3 cups powdered sugar
  • 2 tablespoons milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Pink and white mini marshmallows
  • Black edible marker or black icing gel
  • Assorted pastel sprinkles
  • Pink food coloring (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #vanilla #butter #powdered

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Easy and Colorful Easter Treats to Brighten Your Spring Brunch
item.description: These vibrant Easter treats are simple to make and packed with fresh flavors. I love how the natural colors brighten up any brunch table. Perfect for sharing with family or impressing guests during spring celebrations!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced
  • 1 cup fresh blueberries
  • 1 cup fresh raspberries
  • 1 cup whipped cream, chilled
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 12 mini tart shells or graham cracker crust cups
  • Fresh mint leaves for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

item.title: Easy Berry Whip Easter Desserts That Impress in Under 30 Minutes
item.description: These quick Easter desserts are a breeze to make and still feel special. Fresh berries with light whipped cream make them fresh and festive. Great for after dinner or a sweet snack anytime!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups mixed fresh berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries), washed and hulled
  • 1 cup heavy whipping cream, cold
  • 2 tablespoons powdered sugar
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Optional: fresh mint leaves for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Roasted Asparagus with Lemon Zest: A Spring Side Dish for Easter Dinner
item.description: This roasted asparagus side dish highlights the fresh, bright flavors of spring. Lemon zest adds a subtle tang that complements the natural earthiness of asparagus. Ideal for Easter dinner or any spring meal, it balances simplicity with a lively taste profile.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 12 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 22 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g (1 lb) fresh asparagus, trimmed
  • 2 tbsp (30 ml) extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 tsp (2g) lemon zest (from 1 medium lemon)
  • 1/2 tsp (3g) sea salt
  • 1/4 tsp (1g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (15 ml) freshly squeezed lemon juice

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #extra #lemon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Roasted Asparagus with Lemon Zest: A Spring Side Dish for Easter Dinner
media:content.media:description: This roasted asparagus side dish highlights the fresh, bright flavors of spring. Lemon zest adds a subtle tang that complements the natural earthiness of asparagus. Ideal for Easter dinner or any spring meal, it balances simplicity with a lively taste profile.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229712965, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, extra, lemon

item.title: Honey Glazed Carrots: A Simple Sweet Side for Easter Dinner
item.description: A straightforward recipe for honey glazed carrots that combines the natural sweetness of carrots with real honey and a touch of lemon juice. This side dish brings warmth and brightness to the table, especially fitting for Easter celebrations or any family gathering.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g (1 lb) fresh carrots, peeled and cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices
  • 2 tbsp (30 ml) unsalted butter (can substitute with olive oil for dairy-free option)
  • 2 tbsp (42 g) pure honey (use a mild floral variety for balanced sweetness)
  • 1 tbsp (15 ml) fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 tsp (2.5 g) fine sea salt
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (4 g) chopped fresh parsley or thyme for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229712965 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #unsalted #honey

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Honey Glazed Carrots: A Simple Sweet Side for Easter Dinner
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for honey glazed carrots that combines the natural sweetness of carrots with real honey and a touch of lemon juice. This side dish brings warmth and brightness to the table, especially fitting for Easter celebrations or any family gathering.

media:content.media:title: Mini Carrot Cake Bites with Cream Cheese Frosting
media:content.media:description: These mini carrot cake bites are tender and moist, seasoned with warm spices and finished with a smooth, tangy cream cheese frosting. Their size makes them easy to share, especially during Easter gatherings. This recipe balances texture and flavor by carefully managing moisture and spice integration.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229712965, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious
